dbQueries: SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(publishedAt), COUNT(source), COUNT(trustLevel) FROM NewsEvent;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent WHERE publishedAt > ingestedAt;
SELECT MIN(publishedAt), MAX(publishedAt), MIN(ingestedAt), MAX(ingestedAt) FROM NewsEvent;
SELECT trustLevel, COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent GROUP BY trustLevel ORDER BY 2 DESC;
SELECT source, COUNT(*) FROM NewsEvent GROUP BY source ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10;

pitMetrics.historicalImportGapNote: 1018 rows span publishedAt from 2025-12-29 to 2026-05-05. Minimum ingestedAt is 2026-03-15, meaning the earliest ~3 months of events were ingested retrospectively (historical import). This is expected for RSS backfill. PIT gate uses publishedAt (publication time), not ingestedAt, which correctly reflects when events were publicly available.
